'''竏喃-sh-j''' ('''kafashaj''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zay|zay]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-sh-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zay|zay]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏喃-sh-j
|-
! Lemma
| kafashaj
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifashaj|thifashaj]] || [[word:jifashaj|jifashaj]] || [[word:shifashaj|shifashaj]] || [[word:kifashaj|kifashaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufashaj|thuthufashaj]] || [[word:jujufashaj|jujufashaj]] || [[word:shushufashaj|shushufashaj]] || [[word:kukufashaj|kukufashaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufashaj|thufashaj]] || [[word:jufashaj|jufashaj]] || [[word:shufashaj|shufashaj]] || [[word:kufashaj|kufashaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufashaj|thufashaj]] || [[word:jufashaj|jufashaj]] || [[word:shufashaj|shufashaj]] || [[word:kufashaj|kufashaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefashaj|thefashaj]] || [[word:jefashaj|jefashaj]] || [[word:shefashaj|shefashaj]] || [[word:kefashaj|kefashaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofashaj|thothofashaj]] || [[word:jojofashaj|jojofashaj]] || [[word:shoshofashaj|shoshofashaj]] || [[word:kokofashaj|kokofashaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofashaj|thofashaj]] || [[word:jofashaj|jofashaj]] || [[word:shofashaj|shofashaj]] || [[word:kofashaj|kofashaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofashaj|thofashaj]] || [[word:jofashaj|jofashaj]] || [[word:shofashaj|shofashaj]] || [[word:kofashaj|kofashaj]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fashaj|fashaj]] || [[word:fashaj|fashaj]] || [[word:fashaj|fashaj]] || [[word:fashaj|fashaj]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fashaj|fashaj]] || [[word:fashaj|fashaj]] || [[word:fashaj|fashaj]] || [[word:fashaj|fashaj]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fashaj|fashaj]] || [[word:fashaj|fashaj]] || [[word:fashaj|fashaj]] || [[word:fashaj|fashaj]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fashaj|fashaj]] || [[word:fashaj|fashaj]] || [[word:fashaj|fashaj]] || [[word:fashaj|fashaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦfashaj|thﾃｦfashaj]] || [[word:jﾃｦfashaj|jﾃｦfashaj]] || [[word:shﾃｦfashaj|shﾃｦfashaj]] || [[word:kﾃｦfashaj|kﾃｦfashaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafashaj|thathafashaj]] || [[word:jajafashaj|jajafashaj]] || [[word:shashafashaj|shashafashaj]] || [[word:kakafashaj|kakafashaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafashaj|thafashaj]] || [[word:jafashaj|jafashaj]] || [[word:shafashaj|shafashaj]] || [[word:kafashaj|kafashaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafashaj|thafashaj]] || [[word:jafashaj|jafashaj]] || [[word:shafashaj|shafashaj]] || [[word:kafashaj|kafashaj]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafashaj|shafashaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafashaj|goshafashaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafashaj|gokishafashaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafashajnﾃｼ|shafashajnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafashajnknﾃｼ|goshafashajnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafashajnﾃｼ|gokishafashajnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafashajshﾃｫ|shafashajshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafashajnkshﾃｫ|goshafashajnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafashajshﾃｫ|gokishafashajshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafashajro|shafashajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafashajnkro|goshafashajnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafashajro|gokishafashajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafashajmu|shafashajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafashajnkmu|goshafashajnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafashajmu|gokishafashajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafashajsher|shafashajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafashajnksher|goshafashajnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafashajsher|gokishafashajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafashajng|shafashajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafashajnkng|goshafashajnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafashajng|gokishafashajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafashajya|shafashajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafashajnkya|goshafashajnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafashajya|gokishafashajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafashajyam|shafashajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafashajnkyam|goshafashajnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafashajyam|gokishafashajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafashajnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shafashajnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafashajnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshafashajnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafashajnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishafashajnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafashajnﾃｼro|shafashajnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafashajnknﾃｼro|goshafashajnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafashajnﾃｼro|gokishafashajnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafashajnﾃｼmu|shafashajnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafashajnknﾃｼmu|goshafashajnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafashajnﾃｼmu|gokishafashajnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafashajshﾃｫnﾃｼ|shafashajshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafashajnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshafashajnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafashajshﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishafashajshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafashajshﾃｫro|shafashajshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafashajnkshﾃｫro|goshafashajnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafashajshﾃｫro|gokishafashajshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafashajshﾃｫmu|shafashajshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafashajnkshﾃｫmu|goshafashajnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafashajshﾃｫmu|gokishafashajshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafashajronﾃｼ|shafashajronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafashajnkronﾃｼ|goshafashajnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafashajronﾃｼ|gokishafashajronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafashajroshﾃｫ|shafashajroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafashajnkroshﾃｫ|goshafashajnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafashajroshﾃｫ|gokishafashajroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafashajromu|shafashajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafashajnkromu|goshafashajnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafashajromu|gokishafashajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafashajmunﾃｼ|shafashajmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafashajnkmunﾃｼ|goshafashajnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafashajmunﾃｼ|gokishafashajmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafashajmushﾃｫ|shafashajmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafashajnkmushﾃｫ|goshafashajnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafashajmushﾃｫ|gokishafashajmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafashajmuro|shafashajmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafashajnkmuro|goshafashajnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafashajmuro|gokishafashajmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
